evidence_snippets: Microsoft describes itself as a technology company
Microsoft’s defense is integration, enterprise trust, cross-platform presence, and installed-base leverage.
Microsoft continued to return substantial capital to shareholders.
Microsoft’s use of debt appears opportunistic and strategic rather than balance-sheet constrained.
Microsoft operates under evolving laws and regulations
Microsoft does not signal an expectation of
Microsoft is both a cloud provider and a security vendor
Microsoft’s FY2025 capital intensity was extraordinarily high for a software company
